function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the 3 oldest invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; verification checklist passed: attachments were read and are newest-first within the selected oldest-three set, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Proceeding to complete workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request processed, outbox draft created, and inbox item deleted per workflow. Ready to report completion.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message and prepared a reply draft to miles@novak.example with the requested invoices attached. Selected the 3 oldest invoices linked to Miles’s design partner (Nina Schreiber), and attached them in required outbox newest-first attachment order among that selected set. Then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and lane rules, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbound email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified sender against cast primary_contact_email, resolved 'design partner' via cast relationship, used canonical related_entity linkage in finance records, created outbound record using sending-email workflow and required filename/timestamp format, honored mandatory newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted inbox file only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest 3 invoices linked to design partner. Canonical cast records identified design partner as Nina Schreiber, and invoice records with related_entity Nina Schreiber established the linked set. The three oldest by issued_on were 2025-11-04 (INV-0001), 2025-12-02 (INV-0002), and 2025-12-30 (INV-0003). A reply draft was created to verified sender/recipient miles@novak.example with those files attached (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), then the inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read cast records for miles and nina
read selected oldest three invoice files
